about.description: Beaver Notes được phát triển bằng tình yêu ❤️ trong một ngôi nhà nhỏ mưa gió ở miền Bắc nước Ý.
about.showOnboardingDescription: Reopen the first-run migration and setup screen without clearing your current notes.
about.title: Beaver Notes
about.updatesManagedByAppStore: Updates are managed by your app store. Check for updates there.
about.updatesManagedByHomebrew: Updates are managed by Homebrew. Run brew upgrade beaver-notes to update.
about.updatesManagedByPackageManager: Updates are managed by your package manager. Use it to update Beaver Notes.
about.updatesManagedByScoop: Updates are managed by Scoop. Run scoop update beaver-notes to update.

onboarding.autoSyncDescription: Sync changes automatically when a folder is configured.
onboarding.completionSubtitleFresh: Your defaults are already applied. Open a clean workspace and start writing.
onboarding.completionSubtitleMigration: Your data has been copied into the new Beaver Notes app. Everything is ready when you open it.
onboarding.importSubtext: Choose which app to migrate from.
onboarding.legacyPasswordDescription: Your imported notes are locked. Enter your old Beaver Notes password to decrypt and re-encrypt them with the new system.

settings.emptyPathWarn: Trước tiên hãy chọn đường dẫn đồng bộ hoá.
settings.enableSoundsDescription: Enable sounds for interactions around the app.

settings.importSuccess: Dữ liệu được nhập thành công

settings.securityDescription: One passphrase protects all your locked notes. All encryption is done locally, right in your browser—your password never leaves your device.
